testcase.name: returns false for STANDARD classified transaction
MissingVatNumber error contains the counterparty ID
returns MissingVatNumber when VAT number is blank
returns Ok when counterparty has a valid VAT number
net VAT impact is zero for fully deductible reverse charge
returns false for EXEMPT classified transaction
returns MissingVatNumber when VAT number is null
truncates toward zero on fractional reverse charge amounts
applies 25% self-assessment to 10,000 DKK cross-border service
returns InvalidTransaction error for non-REVERSE_CHARGE transaction
returns true for REVERSE_CHARGE classified transaction
